title: RAG Run Record
description: Lightweight run record for PDF extraction, Chroma build, retrieval, KG extraction, and related RAG jobs.

run_id.description: Stable unique run identifier, preferably task_type plus local timestamp or UUID.

started_at.description: ISO 8601 start time with timezone when available.

finished_at.description: ISO 8601 finish time with timezone when available; null for interrupted or still-running jobs.

duration_seconds.description: Wall-clock duration in seconds; null when unavailable.

status.description: Final run status. Use partial when outputs exist but missing fields, malformed log lines, or skipped stages remain.

input_paths.description: Files or directories read by the run.

output_paths.description: Files, directories, indexes, or reports written by the run.

errors.description: Explicit failures, malformed log details, skipped critical stages, or validation errors.

log_path.description: Primary .log or run_record JSON path used to reconstruct the record.

notes.description: Human-readable context, assumptions, and known gaps.
